title: thelypteris malangae
intro: Thelypteris malangae, also known as the Malang fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris malangae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it can also be used topically to apply its therapeutic properties directly to the skin.
